$Comment: PLAYTEST preset (partial overlay, decoded via MobScalingSettingsAsset.CODEC). Only the keys that differ from Default; omitted leaves fall through to the jar Default via the per-leaf fold. Selected by setting ActivePreset:"Playtest" (owner file or /mobscaling preset Playtest). A steep, fast-ramp curve for testing: escalation starts AT spawn and climbs steeply (a point every 50 blocks) so difficulty and rarity rise quickly within a short walk, backed by a steep StatCurve (fast HP/damage growth, high caps). Not for production.
Name: Playtest
